---
title: "Visual access to graph content using magic lenses and filtering"
author:
  - name: Jakub Ukrop
  - name: Zuzana Číková
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2012-03-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Proceedings - SCCG 2012: 28th Spring Conference on Computer Graphics"
  doi: "10.1145/2448531.2448534"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1145/2448531.2448534"
  page: "23-30"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1145/2448531.2448534](https://doi.org/10.1145/2448531.2448534)
